content.en:
After a long time, the Fire Pattern War Ancestor spoke: "The Silent Annihilation Clan is the existence of the Annihilation Clan, they don't seem to exist under the Great Dao, they are beyond time and space, beyond the rules, and they are comparable to the Superior Domain Ancestor as soon as they are born, and the best of them are even more comparable to the Ancestors!"

"What!"

Ye Tian's eyes widened, and his expression was incredulous.

Just born, it is comparable to the ancestor of the non-superior domain, and the best is comparable to the ancestor.

Is the Ancestor of Silence so terrifying?

What is the use of cultivation, how can it be compared to the Silent Annihilation Clan?

It's no wonder that the Fire Emblem War Ancestor is so frightened, this Silent Annihilation Clan is so terrifying!

"The Silent Annihilation Clan is so terrifying, why haven't you heard of it, it stands to reason that they have already entered the Dark Sanctuary!"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

"Because of the resistance of the Ancestors!" said the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, "Where do you think the Ancestors are? Are they really in the Dark Sanctuary? No, it is only the incarnation of the Ancestors who remain in the Dark Sanctuary. Even in the last Primordial Ancestral Realm dispute, it was only the incarnation of the ancestors who attacked. The true bodies of the ancestors are much stronger than the avatars, and they are resisting the Silent Extinction Clan. Moreover, the unattained domain ancestors of the ten holy gates, there are also some who are resisting the Silent Annihilation Clan, and even some holy lands must also send unsuperior domain ancestors to guard the town, and whichever holy land is the turn, which holy land must send people. For example, the Jinchen Holy Ancestor of the Qingyuan Holy Land was chosen, but he returned with a heavy injury and has been healing. "

"In fact, there are more than you know about the Dark Sanctuary's Superior Domain Ancestors, even the Ancestors are not just ten, but twenty-three, and the Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain must also be guarded, and their Ancestors are even more. Our Dark Sanctuary and Dark Destruction Domain can fight each other, as long as it doesn't involve the ancestor level, it's actually nothing, even if some non-superior domain ancestors fall. But in the matter of resisting the Silent Annihilation Clan, there is no negotiation, and it must be resisted. Otherwise, if it can't be stopped, both the Dark Sanctuary and the Dark Destruction Domain will be finished. In addition, the Dark Forbidden Domain is too big, and there are also some Scattered Cultivation Ancestors and Scattered Cultivation Ancestors without Superior Domains, once they are discovered, they must go to the town to guard it, otherwise they will inevitably be hunted down by all the Ancestors. At the beginning, some Holy Gates suspected that there were ancestors behind you, so they tried again and again, but they didn't find any evidence, so they didn't stop!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian completely understood.

"Where is the Silencer?"

Ye Tian asked this last question.

"The edge of the Dark Forbidden Domain, the endless space-time corridor, the Dark Forbidden Domain seems to be boundless, in fact, the ancestors walked in time and space, but they could resist any place in the Dark Forbidden Domain, the ability of the Ancestors far surpassed that of the Superior Domain Ancestors, even if the Superior Domain Ancestors flew hundreds of millions of epochs, they could not fly to the end of the Dark Forbidden Domain, but the Ancestors could walk to the end of the Dark Forbidden Domain through time and space. A long time ago, the ancestors walked in the depths of time and space, and found a dark area in the endless space-time corridor, which penetrated into the depths of endless time and space, making the ancestors extremely puzzled, and after they explored, they finally discovered the existence of the Silent Annihilation. A great war broke out, one Ancestor fell, and six Ancestors were severely wounded. After that, the ancestors gathered, and only then did they resist the Silent Annihilation. "

"The Silencers seem to have no wisdom and can't communicate, the ancestors knew through calculations that once they couldn't stop the Silencers, the Silencers would destroy everything, make everything one, and return time and space to the original point, because the Silencers can affect time and space, infiltrate time and space, this is the most terrifying point!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor said with a slight horror.

Then, he calmed down again and said with a smile: "Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, you don't need to worry, the Ancestor Ancestor has resisted the Silent Annihilation Clan, and there is still no problem at present." If more Ancestors are born in the Dark Sanctuary, there is even hope that the Silent Annihilation Clan will be destroyed in the future!"

"Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, I'm not worried!"

Ye Tian has a good mentality.

He thinks that he will definitely be able to become the ancestor, and even be able to destroy the Silent Extinction Clan by himself in the future.

"That's good!"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor was relieved.

He was afraid that Ye Tian would find out about the Silent Annihilation Clan, lose the motivation to progress, and give up on himself, which would not be good.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked again: "Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, what is going on with the Time Realm, why is a person only allowed to enter once in his life, is it true that he can't enter the second time?"

"The realm of time?" "That thing is actually made of the core fragment of the corpse of one of the ancestors of the Silent Annihilation Clan, the Silent Annihilation Clan can erode time and space, so the Time Realm can affect both time and space, and it can also erode time and space, if you enter it for the second time, you have already left a mark on the Time Realm." After all, when you enter for the first time, you almost always go out when you are about to reach the limit, and the second time you will have a greater impact, you will not be able to resist the erosion of time and space, and you will be assimilated by time, or by the power of the Silent Clan. The Time Realm cannot assimilate the Ancestors, but it is useless or ineffective against the Ancestors. And the people under the ancestors can't resist the erosion of time, so they can only enter once!"

"I see. Ye Tian understood.

That is to say, the first time he entered the realm of time, the realm of time remembered him, and the second time he entered, he would be eroded by time, and it would be almost impossible to resist under the ancestor, and it would be eroded 100%, and there would be no way to exit in time.

But Ye Tian knew the principle of the Time Realm, and it was actually not so weird.

If he uses his copying talent to copy other people's bodies and then enters the realm of time, he is equivalent to another person.

He only needs to pay for the cost of opening the Time Realm, and it doesn't matter how many times he uses it.

However, when he stepped into the level of a Peerless Domain Ancestor, the Realm of Time was estimated to be of little use to him, after all, ordinary cultivation comprehension could hardly be quickly improved.

The Time Realm is of little use except for a long time.

"Then use the realm of time to cultivate the ancestral technique, and strive to use the endless long years to cultivate a sect ancestral technique to the realm of Dacheng and even the realm of consummation. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, to copy someone else's body, that person must also have the ancestral endowment, otherwise without the ancestral endowment's body, there will be nothing like entering the realm of time, and there is no way to improve the ancestral skill after endless years of cultivation!

For others, it was an unsolvable problem, but for Ye Tian, it was simple.

He can catch some sinful domain ancestors, give them a sect of ancestral endowments, and then kill them, and then copy their bodies, so that the copied bodies have ancestral endowments.

"I'm a genius!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but praise his plan.

Subsequently, he began the program.

Once the plan is successful, he will be able to cultivate a sect ancestor technique to the consummation realm in a short period of time, and his strength will skyrocket many times.
